RevisionEvent.Note: Only known prior ReleaseDate of the metadata
Added HelioData InformationURL, Updated to SPASE Version 2.7.1. JWL

ResourceHeader.Description:
The Geoscience Australia geomagnetism data and reports site is 
		  operated by the Australian government. At the release date, GA provides 
		  online minute values from 10 different magnetometers.

InformationURL.Name: Geoscience Australia: Minute Values Request Form
InformationURL.Description:
Requestion form for 1 minute resolution magnetometer data. 
			  Links to additional information also available.

InformationURL.Name: HelioData
InformationURL.Description: The HelioData mission page provides an overview of the mission and more, such as all SPASE dataset records associated with it.
